description_long: This object is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, slender barrel. The stock is a warm, reddish-brown wood, smoothly contoured for shoulder support, and extends to a slightly curved butt. The barrel and action are finished in matte black metal, with visible iron sights mounted along the top. The trigger guard and bolt handle are also black, contrasting with the wood. The rifle features a fixed internal magazine, and the overall design is reminiscent of traditional hunting or military rifles, with no visible modern attachments or accessories.
description: A traditional bolt-action rifle with a reddish-brown wooden stock and a long black barrel, featuring iron sights and a classic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, black barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the rounded end of the wooden stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the rifle's length, stock, and barrel details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel.
